title: Document AppState coverage matrix and refresh GOAL for 0.2 dogfood surfaces
description: Document AppState coverage matrix and refresh GOAL for 0.2 dogfood surfaces
no_spec_change_rationale: Docs-only confidence refresh; demo keys and spikes already contracted in accepted SpecSync changes.
acceptance_criteria: README lists an AppState surface coverage matrix with dogfood status and spike no-go links; GOAL checks Slice, ObservedDependency, and spike criteria; SecureState opt-in smoke is documented.
